This action cannot be undone.
ui.delete_chat_confirm_body:
Permanently delete "%s"?

This action cannot be undone.
ui.composer_placeholder: Write your message…  /help  ·  @file  ·  Ctrl+V paste screenshot  ·  Shift+Enter new line  ·  Enter to send
ui.think_unsupported: This model does not support thinking
ui.vision_unsupported: This model does not support vision
ui.attach_image_tooltip: Attach image (Ctrl+V paste screenshot; enable Vision to send)
ui.attach_image_unsupported: This model does not support vision — images cannot be attached
ui.attach_not_image: Selected file is not an image
ui.vision_required_for_images: Enable Vision and pick a vision-capable model to send images
ui.analyze_attachments_prompt: Analyze the attached files and images.
ui.stop_tooltip: Stop request and cancel cloud agent (click ■)
ui.message_queued_badge: Queued — sends when the current request finishes (■ cancels all)
ui.status_enable_provider: Enable a provider and refresh models
ui.agent_step_updated: Step %d/%d updated · waiting for next response…
ui.agent_paused_status: Agent paused — reply below to continue
ui.agent_paused_placeholder: Answer the agent's question or type «continue»…
ui.retry_busy: Wait for the current request to finish
ui.context_depth_invalid: Invalid depth. Use basic, intermediate or full.
ui.skills_path:
Skills folder: %s
Copy .md files there and use /skill <id> or the dropdown.
config.title: AI Assistant Configuration
config.subtitle: Providers, editor tools, agent loop and UI language
config.general_hint: Model behavior, context, agent loop and language
config.providers_hint: Connect Ollama, LM Studio, OpenRouter, Kimi, MiniMax, OpenAI, Anthropic, Cursor or Gemini
config.include_context_hint: Send scene and project info to the model
config.enable_tools_hint: Allow tool calls inside Godot editor
config.enable_thinking_hint: Ask model to reason in thinking blocks
config.web_search_hint: Serper (serper.dev) or Brave Search API for web_search and finding asset URLs.
config.enable_web_search_hint: Allow web_search in the agent tool loop
config.api_key_env_hint: API key is loaded from environment variable %s (overrides encrypted storage).
config.secrets_hint: API keys are stored encrypted in user://ai_assistant_plugin/secrets.enc (not in repo JSON).
config.cursor_hint: local_proxy: cursor-openai-api on port 8080. cloud_agents: Cursor dashboard API key.
config.openrouter_hint: API key from openrouter.ai/keys. Default endpoint: openrouter.ai/api/v1. Models use prefixes (e.g. deepseek/deepseek-chat).
config.kimi_hint: API key from platform.kimi.ai. China: set endpoint to https://api.moonshot.cn/v1/chat/completions
config.minimax_hint: Subscription key from platform.minimax.io. China: https://api.minimaxi.com/v1/chat/completions. No /models list — pick from dropdown or type model name.
config.save_hint: Settings in plugin_config.json; API keys encrypted in user://
config.skills_hint: Browse skills.sh and install markdown skills into your project
config.skills_installed_empty: No skills installed yet. Search below and click Install.
config.skills_search_hint: Results from skills.sh — click Install to save a skill as .md
config.skills_query_short: Enter at least 2 characters to search
config.skills_busy: Another request is in progress, please wait
config.skills_no_results: No skills found for this query
config.indexing_hint: Local index: lexical grep + semantic embeddings + documentation (ClassDB, README) — all on disk
config.enable_project_index_hint: Build and use a persistent lexical index of scripts, scenes, and SceneBuilder assets
config.index_on_startup_hint: Sync index when the editor loads if missing or stale
config.index_auto_sync_hint: Re-index when Godot detects filesystem changes
config.index_status_empty: No index yet. Click Sync now to build one.
config.index_status_ready: Ready — %d files, %d SceneBuilder items, %d scene summaries, %d symbols
config.index_semantic_ready: Semantic index: %d embedded chunks (local Ollama/LM Studio)
config.index_semantic_pending: Semantic index: not built yet (requires Ollama embedding model, e.g. nomic-embed-text)
config.enable_semantic_index_hint: Embed project chunks with a local model — vectors stay on disk, never uploaded
config.enable_docs_index_hint: Index project markdown, global class_name scripts, and Godot ClassDB summaries (all local)
cmd.help:
Available commands:
/clear — clear current chat
/new — new chat
/history — list saved chats
/skill [id] — switch active skill (no id = list)
/skills — skills folder path
/context basic|intermediate|full — context depth
/models — refresh model list
/help — this help

@ mentions:
@scene @selection @res://path/file.tscn @skill:name
